create: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS years (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE, start_date DATE NOT NULL, end_date DATE NOT NULL);
insert: INSERT INTO years (name, start_date, end_date) VALUES (%s, %s, %s);
update: UPDATE years SET name = %s, start_date = %s, end_date = %s WHERE id = %s;

fetch.all: SELECT id, name, start_date, end_date FROM years;
fetch.by_id: SELECT id, name, start_date, end_date FROM years WHERE id = %s;
fetch.by_name: SELECT id, name, start_date, end_date FROM years WHERE name = %s;
fetch.current: SELECT id, name, start_date, end_date FROM years WHERE start_date <= CURDATE() AND end_date >= CURDATE() LIMIT 1;
